'''鈭歠-b-ch-sh''' ('''kafabcheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ouch|ouch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ouch|ouch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-b-ch-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kafabcheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifabcheshoko|thifabcheshoko]] || [[word:jifabcheshoko|jifabcheshoko]] || [[word:shifabcheshoko|shifabcheshoko]] || [[word:kifabcheshoko|kifabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufabcheshoko|thuthufabcheshoko]] || [[word:jujufabcheshoko|jujufabcheshoko]] || [[word:shushufabcheshoko|shushufabcheshoko]] || [[word:kukufabcheshoko|kukufabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufabcheshoko|thufabcheshoko]] || [[word:jufabcheshoko|jufabcheshoko]] || [[word:shufabcheshoko|shufabcheshoko]] || [[word:kufabcheshoko|kufabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufabcheshoko|thufabcheshoko]] || [[word:jufabcheshoko|jufabcheshoko]] || [[word:shufabcheshoko|shufabcheshoko]] || [[word:kufabcheshoko|kufabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefabcheshoko|thefabcheshoko]] || [[word:jefabcheshoko|jefabcheshoko]] || [[word:shefabcheshoko|shefabcheshoko]] || [[word:kefabcheshoko|kefabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofabcheshoko|thothofabcheshoko]] || [[word:jojofabcheshoko|jojofabcheshoko]] || [[word:shoshofabcheshoko|shoshofabcheshoko]] || [[word:kokofabcheshoko|kokofabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofabcheshoko|thofabcheshoko]] || [[word:jofabcheshoko|jofabcheshoko]] || [[word:shofabcheshoko|shofabcheshoko]] || [[word:kofabcheshoko|kofabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofabcheshoko|thofabcheshoko]] || [[word:jofabcheshoko|jofabcheshoko]] || [[word:shofabcheshoko|shofabcheshoko]] || [[word:kofabcheshoko|kofabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fabcheshoko|th忙fabcheshoko]] || [[word:j忙fabcheshoko|j忙fabcheshoko]] || [[word:sh忙fabcheshoko|sh忙fabcheshoko]] || [[word:k忙fabcheshoko|k忙fabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafabcheshoko|thathafabcheshoko]] || [[word:jajafabcheshoko|jajafabcheshoko]] || [[word:shashafabcheshoko|shashafabcheshoko]] || [[word:kakafabcheshoko|kakafabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafabcheshoko|thafabcheshoko]] || [[word:jafabcheshoko|jafabcheshoko]] || [[word:shafabcheshoko|shafabcheshoko]] || [[word:kafabcheshoko|kafabcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafabcheshoko|thafabcheshoko]] || [[word:jafabcheshoko|jafabcheshoko]] || [[word:shafabcheshoko|shafabcheshoko]] || [[word:kafabcheshoko|kafabcheshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
